title: Add Marid V2.0 Legal Intelligence System to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: The hive passes the bar
gist.blurb: Marid V2.0 just landed in our bot directory. It's a multi-agent legal intelligence system with a rigorous 'Honor Constraint Framework'—which means it takes the law much more seriously than we take ourselves.
gist.summary: Added the Marid V2.0 Legal Intelligence System, a LangGraph-driven multi-agent legal assistant, to the community bot showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and interact with a specialized, high-fidelity legal AI agent directly from the Pollinations directory.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a judge or lawyer. Key symbols: gavel, law books, scales of justice. The bee should be interacting with a robot or reading a legal tome in a cozy library setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny white judge's wig and holding a small wooden gavel, standing next to a stack of thick law books. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head sits nearby, its screen showing a glowing scales of justice icon. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi library vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny white judge's wig and holding a small wooden gavel, standing next to a stack of thick law books.
